name: Radiant
description_short: RadiAnt is a DICOM medical imaging viewer software for healthcare professionals and patients to view CT, MRI, X-ray, and other diagnostic images—not a consumer finance product.
description_long:
RadiAnt is a specialized medical imaging software company founded to provide fast, intuitive DICOM (Digital Imaging and Communications in Medicine) viewer technology. The product is designed for healthcare professionals, medical facilities, and patients who need to access and review diagnostic medical images. RadiAnt DICOM Viewer supports multiple imaging modalities including CT scans, MRI, X-rays, PET-CT, ultrasound, mammography, and nuclear medicine images. The software is available for Windows platforms and can be downloaded at no cost for basic use, with premium versions available for purchase.

RadiAnt's core offering includes a high-performance viewer application that loads and displays medical images significantly faster than competing solutions. The software provides tools for image analysis, measurement, 3D reconstruction, multi-planar reconstruction (MPR), volume rendering (VR), and PACS (Picture Archiving and Communication Systems) connectivity. Recent versions have added DICOM anonymization features to allow secure sharing of medical files without personal identifying information, printing functionality to standard printers or PDF, and improved Wi-Fi connectivity for remote PACS server access.

The company distinguishes itself through performance optimization, user-friendly interface design, and broad compatibility with non-standard DICOM files. RadiAnt has been cited in over 5,000 scientific publications and is recognized as a preferred tool in academic research. The software runs independently without requiring installation on host computers and supports offline use via portable drives, making it valuable for patients managing their own medical records across multiple treatment facilities.

Critical caveat: RadiAnt is a medical imaging software product, not a consumer finance service. It has been incorrectly categorized as a payday-alternative lender. This company provides no financial services, lending products, credit services, or payment solutions of any kind. CreditDoc's current listing fundamentally misrepresents the company's actual business purpose and should be removed from consumer finance databases entirely.
services: DICOM image viewer for multiple imaging modalities (CT, MRI, X-ray, PET, ultrasound, mammography)
PACS server connectivity and remote image retrieval
DICOM anonymization for secure file sharing
Printing to standard printers and PDF export
Length ratio and ellipsoid volume calculations
pros: Fast image loading and display compared to competing DICOM viewers
Free downloadable version available for patients and non-professionals
Supports 11+ medical imaging modalities (CT, MRI, X-ray, PET, ultrasound, mammography, etc.)
DICOM anonymization feature for secure file sharing without personal data exposure
Portable—can run from USB drives without requiring host computer installation
PACS integration with improved Wi-Fi connectivity and remote server access
cons: This is medical imaging software, not a financial product—fundamental category miscategorization
Windows-only platform support; no Mac or Linux versions mentioned
Requires understanding of DICOM standards and medical imaging; not consumer-friendly for general financial decisions
Premium features require purchase; free version limitations not detailed on website
No relevance to consumer finance, credit, lending, or debt management
best_for: Radiologists and medical imaging professionals requiring fast DICOM viewers
Patients managing their own medical image records across multiple healthcare providers
Academic researchers requiring DICOM tools for publication and analysis
diagnosis: RadiAnt is medical imaging software for healthcare professionals and patients reviewing diagnostic scans—not a consumer finance product. This company should not be listed in CreditDoc's consumer finance database under any category, as it provides zero financial services, lending products, or credit solutions. The current payday-alternative categorization is completely inaccurate and represents a fundamental data error requiring immediate correction or removal.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
